name: Electric Fairyland
short_description: Join Stix the fairy on an a tiny 3D adventure through the dense undergrowth of a fantasy garden. A bite-sized collectathon inspired by 90s platformers and childrens' picture books.
detailed_description:
Stix has found themselves lost in the dense undergrowth of a fantasy forest after being accidentally transformed into a fairy. Join them as they run, jump, bounce and glide through various vibrant environments, and help them rescue the citizens of the forest from a nefarious enemy...



Estimated playtime: 1 hour!

Features:
  • Retro-inspired 3D graphics and gameplay reminiscent of late-90s platformers.
  • Over 20 bite-sized levels
  • Collect glitter, marbles, red keys and more.
  • An ethereal 80s-inspired soundtrack by Barchboi.


Electric Fairyland was commissioned by Sokpop Collective, an indie game studio from the Netherlands who bring new fun, experimental games into the world every month! Thanks Sokpop! <3
